candidate_implementation.cycle_boundary: The six generated products identify their output paths but do not contain their own digest. The composition product binds the five siblings.

declared_mismatch.finding: The workspace still declares version 0.1.0-experimental, author Sepahead, and publish=false. These values do not declare the planned 0.9.0 release.

packages.description: Strict signed deployment-package and artifact verification primitives
packages.name: haldir-deployment

packages.description: Haldir Gate — composed one-vehicle authorization runtime
packages.name: haldir-gate

policy.configuration_rule: DEFAULT, NO_DEFAULT, each non-default named package feature, and ALL_FEATURES for every library package and target

bootstrap.limitation: The public-API oracle uses an unstable output format. It does not claim that stable rustdoc supports JSON without the bootstrap flag.
bootstrap.reason: Rust 1.96.0 requires the unstable rustdoc JSON output option. The compiler and rustdoc binaries remain pinned to 1.96.0.

candidate_projection.rule: Recompute candidate counts at I; do not add them to the F oracle.
